title: Floor 2: DISC Recognition
purpose: Practice identifying DISC expression without judging the person.

questions.prompt: The character moves fast, takes charge, and becomes forceful when the room feels uncertain. Which DISC expression is showing?
questions.hint: D pressure often appears as command, urgency, and control.

questions.prompt: Which response shows a healthier D expression?
questions.hint: Healthy D clarifies priority without overpowering the room.

questions.prompt: The goal of this floor is not trivia. What are you practicing?
questions.hint: The core mechanic is state recognition.
